title: Henbrandt 12 x Unicorn Party Bubble Tubes with Wand Children's 4ml Bubbles Loot Bag Fillers Summer Games for Boys and Girls Kids Party Bags
features: Pack of 12 Bubble Tubes with Unicorn Lids for kids.
These mini bubble tubes are ideal for party bag favours, loot bag fillers, classroom rewards and summer fun.
There are 4 pastel colours: Blue, Pink, Purple, White.
description: Product description This multipack of 12 cheerful pastel coloured mini bubble tubes with unicorn shaped toppers for kids is ideal for party bag fillers, loot bag treats, classroom rewards, pinata prizes, stocking fillers, and wedding goodies. The bubbles also make a great outdoor game for sunny days and summer BBQs. Dip the wand in the bubble solution and gently blow to fill the air with iridescent bubbles of all shapes and sizes! Each tube of kids party bubbles contains 4ml of bubble solution and bubble wand is included in the tube. Mini bubble tubes come in 4 colours: Blue, Pink, Purple, White. Three of each colour per multipack. Pack of 12 Bubble Tubes with unicorn Lids for kids. Recommended for use outside, as bubble solution may stain some fabrics – take appropriate precautions if using bubbles indoors. Do not leave children unsupervised with bubble mix. Bubble solution is not for internal consumption. Not suitable for children under the age of 3. This product carries the UKCA mark and complies with all applicable UK safety requirements. Indications Children's parties, party decoration, classroom rewards, summer fun, outdoor activities, weddings, special occasions Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, small parts. Contains bubble solution, staining risk. Adult supervision is recommended. See more
